enriched_points.expanded_content: Iltalehti’s IL-Palat prioritizes short videos, catering to the mobile-first audience, effectively capturing attention in a fast-paced digital landscape.
The introduction of IL-Palat has significantly boosted audience interaction, with viewers spending more time engaging with video content compared to traditional articles.
IL-Palat exemplifies a successful digital strategy, leveraging multimedia to attract younger demographics, ultimately increasing overall readership and advertising revenue.
